backup.reportplan.reportsetting.CfnAbout: Contains detailed information about a report setting.

backup.reportplan.reportsetting.Accounts.Description: These are the accounts to be included in the report.

backup.reportplan.reportsetting.Framewor.Description: The Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) of the frameworks a report covers.

backup.reportplan.reportsetting.Organiza.Description: These are the Organizational Units to be included in the report.

backup.reportplan.reportsetting.Regions.Description: These are the Regions to be included in the report.

backup.reportplan.reportsetting.ReportTe.Description: Identifies the report template for the report. Reports are built using a report template. The report templates are:   `RESOURCE_COMPLIANCE_REPORT | CONTROL_COMPLIANCE_REPORT | BACKUP_JOB_REPORT | COPY_JOB_REPORT | RESTORE_JOB_REPORT`
